summary: Plan mode only. #35406 remains the live canonical issue for the read-tool binary document handling problem. #57600 is already closed as duplicate/superseded and should receive no further close action. #35494 is historical closed contributor work and remains evidence only. #57612 is security-sensitive and should stay quarantined to central OpenClaw security handling.
